milestones.title: Week 1 — Live data MVP
milestones.description: DB live, scheduled ingest, unified frontend data path, expanded scrapers.

milestones.title: Month 1 — Trust & alerts
milestones.description: Dedupe hardening, admin UI, alert delivery (email/Telegram).

milestones.title: Month 2+ — Monetization & scale
milestones.description: Payments, sponsored listings, per-portal scrapers, observability.

issues.title: [P0] Apply Supabase schema and verify jobs table
issues.body:
## Goal
Provision Postgres (Supabase) with the full BharatNaukri schema.

## Tasks
- [ ] Open Supabase SQL Editor
- [ ] Run entire `database/supabase_setup.sql`
- [ ] Confirm tables: `jobs`, `sources`, `raw_ingest`, `alert_subscriptions`, `alert_deliveries`
- [ ] Confirm RLS policies allow public read on live jobs

## Acceptance criteria
- `SELECT count(*) FROM jobs;` runs without error
- Anon key can `select` from `jobs` where `status = 'live'`

issues.title: [P0] Configure backend DATABASE_URL and smoke-test API
issues.body:
## Goal
Backend connects to Supabase/Postgres in local and deployed environments.

## Tasks
- [ ] Copy `backend/.env.example` → `backend/.env`
- [ ] Set `DATABASE_URL` (Supabase pooler, `postgresql+asyncpg://...`)
- [ ] Set `ADMIN_API_KEY` (long random string)
- [ ] `pip install -r backend/requirements.txt`
- [ ] `uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000` from `backend/`
- [ ] Hit `GET /api/health` and `GET /docs`

## Acceptance criteria
- API starts with no DB connection errors
- `GET /api/jobs` returns `{ items: [...] }` (may be empty)

issues.title: [P0] Fix frontend env — anon key only, wire VITE_API_URL
issues.body:
## Goal
Frontend uses safe public env vars only.

## Tasks
- [ ] Copy `frontend/.env.example` → `frontend/.env.local`
- [ ] Set `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` and `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` (anon, NOT service role)
- [ ] Set `VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8000`
- [ ] Rotate any keys that were committed in `.env.example` previously

## Acceptance criteria
- `useLiveJobs` can read from Supabase when configured
- `fetchJobsFromApi` hits backend when `VITE_API_URL` is set

issues.title: [P0] First full ingest run — populate jobs + live-jobs.json
issues.body:
## Goal
Run the ingest pipeline end-to-end once.

## Tasks
- [ ] `POST /api/ingest/run-all?sync=true` with header `X-Admin-Key: <ADMIN_API_KEY>`
- [ ] Or `POST /api/admin/ingest/run-all` (admin route)
- [ ] Check `jobs` row count in Supabase
- [ ] Verify `frontend/public/data/live-jobs.json` updated

## Acceptance criteria
- Ingest response shows `saved > 0` for at least one source
- Homepage shows live rows (not only static `jobs.js`)

issues.title: [P0] Add backend requirements.txt and Dockerfile to CI path
issues.body:
## Goal
Reproducible backend install and container build.

## Tasks
- [ ] Confirm `backend/requirements.txt` lists all imports
- [ ] `docker build -f backend/Dockerfile backend` succeeds
- [ ] Document run command in README

## Acceptance criteria
- Fresh venv + `pip install -r requirements.txt` works
- Docker image starts and serves `/docs`

issues.title: [P0] Update README — schema path, status table, remove dead links
issues.body:
## Goal
README matches the monorepo as built.

## Tasks
- [ ] Replace `postgres_schema.sql` → `database/supabase_setup.sql`
- [ ] Update Status table (API implemented, alerts subscribe-only, monetization TBD)
- [ ] Note `scheduler/` is planned OR link to GitHub Action ingest workflow
- [ ] Link to `docs/ROADMAP.md`

## Acceptance criteria
- New contributor can follow README without 404 file references

issues.title: [P1] GitHub Action — scheduled API ingest
issues.body:
## Goal
Jobs refresh automatically without manual curl.

## Tasks
- [ ] Use `.github/workflows/ingest-api.yml` (or extend existing workflow)
- [ ] Add repo secrets: `BHARATNAUKRI_API_URL`, `ADMIN_API_KEY`
- [ ] Schedule cron (e.g. every 6–12 hours)
- [ ] Monitor Action logs for failures

## Acceptance criteria
- Workflow runs on schedule and `workflow_dispatch`
- API returns 200 and ingest `saved > 0` on success

issues.title: [P1] Unify frontend live data priority chain
issues.body:
## Goal
One clear data priority: avoid fighting sources.

## Suggested order
1. Supabase `jobs` (if configured)
2. Backend API `/api/jobs` (if `VITE_API_URL`)
3. `/data/live-jobs.json`
4. Static `jobs.js` fallback

## Files
- `frontend/src/hooks/useLiveJobs.js`
- `frontend/src/lib/jobsApi.ts`
- `frontend/src/lib/supabase.ts`

## Acceptance criteria
- Documented order in code comment + README
- No duplicate slugs dominate the UI

issues.title: [P1] Enable national board RSS scrapers after URL audit
issues.body:
## Goal
Turn on high-value RSS sources in `scripts/scraper_registry.json`.

## Tasks
- [ ] Verify feed URLs for `rrb-rss`, `drdo-rss`, `isro-rss`
- [ ] Set `enabled: true` when feeds respond
- [ ] Re-run ingest and confirm items saved

## Acceptance criteria
- At least 2 of 3 disabled RSS sources enabled and fetching

issues.title: [P1] Add missing state PSC portals to scraper registry (batch 1)
issues.body:
## Goal
Expand beyond 12 state HTML scrapers.

## Batch 1 states (not in registry today)
KL, PB, HR, CG, JH, UK, HP, AS

## Tasks
- [ ] Add entries to `scripts/scraper_registry.json` (`state_portal_html`)
- [ ] Run `scripts/audit-official-sites.mjs` for each URL
- [ ] Enable after successful test ingest

## Acceptance criteria
- Registry has ≥20 enabled state portal scrapers
- Each new source returns ≥1 recruitment link on test run

issues.title: [P1] Add missing state PSC portals to scraper registry (batch 2)
issues.body:
## Batch 2
MN, SK, GA, TR, ML, MZ, NL, AR, LA, DL, JK

## Acceptance criteria
- All major states/UTs with active PSC sites represented or documented as blocked

issues.title: [P1] Weekly portal health audit automation
issues.body:
## Goal
Catch broken portal URLs before users do.

## Tasks
- [ ] Schedule `scripts/audit-official-sites.mjs` in CI (weekly)
- [ ] Fail or open issue when >10% sources unreachable
- [ ] Update `portal_url` in registry from audit output

## Acceptance criteria
- Audit runs weekly and produces a report artifact or log summary

issues.title: [P1] Reduce HTML scraper noise — validation tuning
issues.body:
## Goal
Fewer junk titles (login, tourism, sitemap) in `jobs`.

## Files
- `backend/app/scrapers/state_portal_html.py`
- `backend/app/services/validation_service.py`

## Acceptance criteria
- Manual review of 50 latest ingested rows: <10% obvious non-job titles

issues.title: [P1] Week 1 exit — ≥50 live jobs on homepage
issues.body:
## Goal
Shippable MVP for real users.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Homepage + map show ≥50 deduped live rows from ingest
- [ ] Data refreshed within last 24h via scheduled ingest
- [ ] Static `jobs.js` only fills gaps, not primary source

issues.title: [P2] Wire title_fingerprint into dedupe pipeline
issues.body:
## Goal
Merge near-duplicates (same notification, different URLs).

## Files
- `backend/app/services/dedupe_service.py`
- `backend/app/services/job_persist_service.py`

## Acceptance criteria
- Duplicate titles from different apply URLs collapse to one job or skip insert

issues.title: [P2] Sync scraper registry → sources table on ingest
issues.body:
## Goal
`/api/admin/sources/health` shows real `last_run_at` and errors.

## Acceptance criteria
- Each ingest run updates `sources` row for that `code`
- Admin health endpoint reflects DB state

issues.title: [P2] Build minimal admin dashboard (React)
issues.body:
## Goal
Non-developers can moderate jobs.

## Features
- [ ] Stats cards (total/live/draft/expired)
- [ ] Job list with status filter
- [ ] PATCH status (live/draft/expired)
- [ ] Button: Run ingest (calls admin API with key from env)
- [ ] Source health table

## Acceptance criteria
- Protected route (env admin key or simple password gate)
- All actions use existing `/api/admin/*` endpoints

issues.title: [P2] Harden PDF parser against 10 real PSC notifications
issues.body:
## Files
- `backend/app/parsers/pdf_parser.py`
- `scripts/parser_templates/default_notification.json`

## Acceptance criteria
- On a test set of 10 PDFs: `last_date` extracted on ≥7; `vacancies` on ≥5

issues.title: [P2] Populate job_posts and job_dates from notifications
issues.body:
## Goal
Use schema tables already defined in `supabase_setup.sql`.

## Acceptance criteria
- Multi-post notifications create child `job_posts` rows
- Key dates stored in `job_dates`
- Job detail UI shows breakdown when present

issues.title: [P2] Expired job lifecycle — auto-mark and hide
issues.body:
## Goal
Past `last_date` jobs don't show as live.

## Acceptance criteria
- Validation or cron sets `status=expired`
- Public API and UI exclude expired by default

issues.title: [P2] Document or implement scheduler for ingest
issues.body:
## Options
- A) GitHub Actions only (current direction)
- B) Add `scheduler/` with Celery + Redis

## Acceptance criteria
- README describes exactly how ingest is scheduled in production

issues.title: [P3] Wire AlertSection to POST /api/alerts/subscribe
issues.body:
## Goal
Subscriptions persist in DB.

## Files
- `frontend/src/components/home/AlertSection.jsx`
- New `frontend/src/lib/alertsApi.ts`

## Acceptance criteria
- Submitting form creates row in `alert_subscriptions`
- Success/error UI feedback

issues.title: [P3] Alert delivery worker — match new jobs to subscriptions
issues.body:
## Goal
On new job insert, queue deliveries.

## Tasks
- [ ] Worker: `backend/app/workers/alert_dispatcher.py` (or GH Action)
- [ ] Match `state_codes`, `categories`, `qualification_tags`
- [ ] Insert `alert_deliveries` (respect UNIQUE)

## Acceptance criteria
- Test subscription receives match when matching job ingested
- No duplicate delivery for same job+subscription

issues.title: [P3] Email alerts — Resend/SendGrid/SMTP
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- Env vars for provider configured
- HTML email with job title, last date, apply link
- Test inbox receives one alert

issues.title: [P3] Telegram alerts — bot + formatted messages
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` + chat id flow documented
- User can subscribe with Telegram channel in API
- Test message delivered on new matching job

issues.title: [P3] Web push notifications (optional)
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- VAPID or FCM integration
- Browser permission + subscribe flow
- Push received for one test job

issues.title: [P3] Alert preferences UI — state and category filters
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- User selects states/categories before subscribe
- Stored in `alert_subscriptions` arrays
- Delivery worker respects filters

issues.title: [P4] Freemium alert tiers (daily email vs instant Telegram)
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- Plan flag on subscription or user
- Free tier: digest only; paid: instant multi-channel

issues.title: [P4] Payments — Razorpay or Stripe subscriptions
issues.body:
## Tasks
- [ ] `subscriptions` table + webhook route
- [ ] Checkout flow in frontend
- [ ] Feature gate for premium alerts

## Acceptance criteria
- One test payment activates premium flag
- Webhook idempotent and verified

issues.title: [P4] Sponsored job listings
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- `jobs.is_sponsored` or detail flag
- Admin can toggle sponsored
- UI shows sponsored badge and sort boost

issues.title: [P4] Outbound apply-link analytics (affiliate-ready)
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- Click events stored (table or analytics)
- Dashboard or export for top apply URLs

issues.title: [P5] Per-portal scraper overrides for top failing states
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- At least 5 states have custom selectors/paths beyond generic HTML scraper
- Failure rate for those states drops measurably

issues.title: [P5] Celery + Redis for long-running ingest (if needed)
issues.body:
## Trigger
Implement only when full ingest exceeds ~5 minutes or needs retries.

## Acceptance criteria
- `scheduler/celery_worker.py` runs ingest tasks
- Redis broker configured via `REDIS_URL`

issues.title: [P5] Full-text search on jobs.search_vector
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- Trigger maintains `search_vector`
- `/api/search` uses Postgres FTS
- Frontend search box uses API

issues.title: [P5] Observability — Sentry + ingest metrics
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- API errors reported to Sentry
- Ingest run logs: sources ok/failed, rows saved, duration

issues.title: [P5] Production hardening — rate limits, WAF, API keys rotation
issues.body:
## Acceptance criteria
- Admin key rotation documented
- CORS locked to production domains
- Rate limit tuned for public endpoints
